author: choonkending
description: Your faithful note-taking companion. Squire automates index numbering and surfaces related notes so you can stay in your flow state. No manual calculation, no hunting for connections. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: choonkending
manifest.description: Your faithful note-taking companion. Automates file title naming, and finds related notes so you can stay in the flow.
manifest.name: Squire

name: Squire

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release Notes for 0.4.4

- Prevent UI freeze during semantic search indexing — warmup() now yields to the browser event loop every 5 notes via setTimeout(fn, 0) instead of blocking through the entire vault. The editor, sidebar, and settings stay responsive while embeddings are computed. Works on desktop (Electron) and mobile (iOS WKWebView, Android WebView). (#14)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release Notes for 0.4.3

- Fix startup crash when WASM binary is missing — If the ONNX WASM binary (ort-wasm-simd-threaded.jsep.wasm) is not found alongside the plugin, setupEnv() no longer returns early with a half-configured environment. It logs a warning and continues, applying the cache and other settings. ONNX Runtime falls back to its default WASM handling, and if pipeline() still fails, the plugin degrades gracefully to TF-IDF mode. 
- Fix getRightLeaf crash on startup — Wrapped openRelatedNotesLeaf() in app.workspace.onLayoutReady() so it runs after Obsidian's workspace layout is fully initialized, preventing a Cannot read properties of null (reading 'children') error.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release Notes for 0.4.2

## Bug Fixes
- Prevent model swap from freezing the UI — Model download now runs in the background instead of blocking the main thread. The settings dropdown remains responsive while the model downloads and initializes. Download progress is shown in the status bar (e.g. "Downloading model: 57%"). Concurrent download requests are guarded against.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release notes for v0.4.1

- fix: Fix lint errors — fixes ESM/TS lint issues with eslint.config.mjs

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release notes for v0.4.0

✨ Hybrid Semantic Search
Related Notes now supports an optional semantic embedding engine for deeper content understanding. When a Transformer model is selected in Settings, Squire combines TF‑IDF lexical scoring with dense-vector cosine similarity — so notes that use different words but share meaning still surface.

New Settings → Similarity scoring:
- Scorer dropdown — choose TF‑IDF (lexical only) (default) or select a model for hybrid scoring (Gte-small / All-MiniLM-L12-v2)
- Clear model cache button to free disk space
- Algorithm badge in the sidebar header shows which scorer is active (TF‑IDF / Hybrid)

UX improvements:
- Status bar + notices show model download and indexing progress
- Stale model files are auto-cleaned from the cache when a model is removed
- Tests no longer use mocks or as any casts — each test is self-contained with inline closures

Under the hood:
- New src/related/semantic/ module with EmbeddingEngine interface, Transformers.js integration, flat EmbeddingIndex with brute-force cosine similarity search, DefaultSemanticService, and NullSemanticService
- MODELS constants in models.ts map model IDs → labels → dimensions
- DiskCache persists downloaded model files via Obsidian's DataAdapter with automatic stale cleanup
- Build configured for @huggingface/transformers 4.2.0 with WASM support

🐛 Fixes
- Context menu items no longer duplicate across plugin reloads
- Algorithm badge now updates immediately when switching models in Settings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.3.1 - 2026-06-19

## Fixed
- Sibling-aware increment and nesting: Transformers now vault-awarely skip existing sibling numbers. When siblings 1.1.1, 1.1.2, and 1.2 exist, incrementing 1.1 produces 1.3 instead of colliding with 1.2.
- Filter non-markdown files from sibling gathering: Non-.md files (.DS_Store, .icloud, images, etc.) no longer influence the numbering sequence.
- Duplicate right-click menu items on hot-reload: Added onunload() cleanup and restored registerEvent() so menu items don't stack on settings changes.
- NaN guard on non-numeric prefixes: MOC - Title now correctly returns "Invalid title format" instead of producing NaN - .
- Sentence-case settings UI: Labels like (Default: X.X) corrected to default: X.X.

## Changed
- Refactored shared numeric prefix logic into src/numberUtils.ts (isNumericPrefix, extractPrefix, getLastSegments).
- Removed redundant manual path normalization in generateNewDocumentPath.
- Removed leftover sample boilerplate comments from test files.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.3.0
✨ Features
- Sidebar toggle: ribbon icon and command now toggle the sidebar open/closed instead of open-only.
- Sidebar persistence: open/closed state is saved across sessions. Opens by default on first install.
- Score color coding: match percentage is color-coded — green (≥70%), yellow (40–69%), red (<40%) — in both sidebar view and modal.
- Better icon: replaced link with network icon for both ribbon and sidebar tab.

🔧 Internal
- Added showRelatedNotesSidebar to settings schema with default true.
- Removed revealRelatedNotesView — unified toggle with shared openRelatedNotesLeaf helper.


📝 Documentation
- README ribbon icon reference updated from "link" to "network".
- AGENTS.md now includes a ## Agent preferences section.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.2.0 — Related Notes & internal cleanup

### ✨ New

- **Related Notes** — Automatically surfaces connected notes based on word, tag, and link similarity. Access via:
  - Sidebar view (auto-refreshes as you switch notes)
  - Quick modal: `Ctrl/Cmd+P` → "Show related notes"
  - Ribbon icon toggle

### ⚙️ Settings

- **Match weights** — Three new settings to tune related notes: Word, Tag, and Link similarity weights (defaults: 1.0, 0.5, 0.5)
- **Number of suggestions** — Control how many related notes to show (1–50)

### 📖 Documentation

- Rewrote README with flow-state framing, covering both Index Numbering and Related Notes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# High Level Overview

Fix incrementing and nesting for files sitting within a folder.

E.g.

```
folder-a/
   1.1 - Biology.md
      1.1.1 - Something.md (This now works)
   1.2 - SomethingElse.md (This now also works)
```

# High Level Overview

- Update the [minAppVersion, i.e. the mnimum required Obsidian version](https://docs.obsidian.md/Reference/Manifest) to be 1.12.0. My current desktop version is 1.12.7. This was causing the migrated plugin (over to Obsidian community) to fail the build.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# High Level Overview

Create squire, your faithful note-taking companion

- Adds commands and right-click menu options to duplicate your current note
- Lets you choose how the new note's name is generated using the _title transformers_ concept.
